disclaimer: This assurance-case bundle is a technical evidence-mapping artifact. It links SPO runtime evidence to published clause identifiers to support review; it does not constitute legal advice, a conformity assessment, or a certification of compliance. Clause text must be confirmed against the official standard, and conformance determined by a qualified assessor.

clauses.title: Record-Keeping
clauses.rationale: Hash-chained, optionally HMAC-signed audit log captures events over the system lifetime.

clauses.title: Accuracy, Robustness and Cybersecurity
clauses.rationale: Tamper-evident hash chain and signing support the integrity facet of robustness and cybersecurity.

clauses.title: Operation
clauses.rationale: Operational records of controlled execution.

clauses.title: Data integrity
clauses.rationale: Append-only chained log with payload digests evidences data integrity.

clauses.title: Safety case construction
clauses.rationale: Audit trail forms part of the supporting evidence body.

clauses.title: Accuracy, Robustness and Cybersecurity
clauses.rationale: Deterministic re-execution demonstrates reproducibility and robustness of recorded behaviour.

clauses.title: Record-Keeping
clauses.rationale: Replay verifies the integrity of the recorded audit log.

clauses.title: Performance evaluation
clauses.rationale: Reproducibility check contributes to performance evaluation.

clauses.title: Autonomy validation
clauses.rationale: Deterministic replay validates recorded autonomous decisions.

clauses.title: Tool qualification
clauses.rationale: Deterministic engine behaviour supports tool qualification.

clauses.title: Accuracy, Robustness and Cybersecurity
clauses.rationale: Formal safety properties and the fail-closed runtime certificate evidence robustness and accuracy bounds.

clauses.title: Risk Management System
clauses.rationale: Property-based checks are a risk-control measure.

clauses.title: Planning
clauses.rationale: Formal property planning supports risk treatment.

clauses.title: AI System Life Cycle
clauses.rationale: Verification artefacts are produced across the AI system life cycle.

clauses.title: Safety case construction
clauses.rationale: Structured formal argument with attached evidence is a safety case.

clauses.title: Risk analysis
clauses.rationale: Formal safety properties encode the analysed hazards.

clauses.title: Risk Management System
clauses.rationale: Continuous twin divergence scoring against a calibrated baseline is a live risk-management control.

clauses.title: Post-Market Monitoring by Providers
clauses.rationale: Online drift monitoring supports post-market monitoring duties.

clauses.title: Accuracy, Robustness and Cybersecurity
clauses.rationale: Divergence bands monitor robustness against the digital twin.

clauses.title: Performance evaluation
clauses.rationale: Quantitative confidence metrics drive performance evaluation.

clauses.title: Information for Interested Parties of AI Systems
clauses.rationale: Confidence summaries inform interested parties of operating state.

clauses.title: Metrics and conformance
clauses.rationale: Confidence scores are conformance metrics for operation.

clauses.title: Risk Management System
clauses.rationale: Coverage-valid admission gate bounds residual risk distribution-free.

clauses.title: Human Oversight
clauses.rationale: Flagged ticks and fail-closed admission route decisions to human oversight.

clauses.title: Post-Market Monitoring by Providers
clauses.rationale: Empirical coverage tracking supports post-market monitoring.

clauses.title: Planning
clauses.rationale: Target miscoverage encodes the planned risk acceptance criterion.

clauses.title: Risk analysis
clauses.rationale: Conformal threshold realises the analysed risk-acceptance bound.

clauses.title: Metrics and conformance
clauses.rationale: Empirical coverage is a conformance metric.

clauses.title: Risk Management System
clauses.rationale: Boundary-violation accounting and bounded action projection are live risk-control measures on the closed loop.

clauses.title: Human Oversight
clauses.rationale: Bounded, rate-limited actions with recorded boundary violations keep the closed loop within enforced limits for human oversight.

clauses.title: Accuracy, Robustness and Cybersecurity
clauses.rationale: Operating-envelope violation counts evidence the run's robustness against declared control bounds.

clauses.title: Operation
clauses.rationale: Control-mode, applied-action, and boundary-violation totals are operational control records for the run.

clauses.title: Safety case construction
clauses.rationale: The recorded control-safety envelope forms part of the supporting safety-case evidence body.

clauses.title: Risk analysis
clauses.rationale: Boundary-violation limits realise the analysed operational hazard bounds.
